s-spiced-pear-bread.name: ’s Spiced Pear Bread
instructions: {'step': 'Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Grease two 8x5x3-inch loaf pans.'}
{'step': 'Combine flour, cinnamon, allspice, nutmeg, cloves, ginger, baking soda, salt, and baking powder in a large mixing bowl.'}
{'step': 'Combine pears, brown sugar, raisins, vegetable oil, white sugar, apple cider, eggs, and vanilla in a separate bowl; blend well. Add to dry ingredients and stir just until moistened.'}
{'step': 'Pour batter evenly into the prepared loaf pans.'}
{'step': 'Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center of each loaf comes out clean, 65 to 70 minutes.'}
{'step': 'Cool in the loaf pans before removing to a wire rack to cool completely.'}
